message:
fix(sync): make semaphore pub(crate) and add OwnedAcquireFuture::new

The concurrency_limit service module needs to construct OwnedAcquireFuture
directly to avoid a lifetime issue where the async fn acquire borrows &Cx
but the future needs to be 'static for Box::pin storage in poll state.

- Make semaphore module pub(crate) so service module can access it
- Add OwnedAcquireFuture::new() constructor taking owned Cx
- Update concurrency_limit to use the new constructor

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
